description_long: This bungalow features a spacious tiled courtyard with a central rectangular pool, flanked by two symmetrical wings under dark brown, steeply pitched hip roofs. The main entrance is set back beneath a covered portico, framed by two large potted plants and several palm trees, creating a tropical ambiance. Blue lounge chairs are arranged around the pool, suggesting a leisure-oriented design. The structure is primarily white with dark roof accents, and the tiled ground extends throughout the outdoor area. Large arched doorways provide access to the interior from the courtyard, and the overall layout is open and inviting. The architectural style emphasizes outdoor living, with a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A white, single-story bungalow with dark hip roofs, a central pool, palm trees, and blue lounge chairs in a tiled courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central pool, palm trees, blue lounge chairs, and symmetrical wings under dark roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the courtyard, the tiled ground, and the extension of the roof over the side wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow with the roof structure and minimal visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tiled courtyard, pool, and the side profile of the bungalow's roof and walls.
